label: Vow Reliquary Store
description: This storage room is a narrow ashlar vault set behind iron-banded shelving, built to the same fortified standard as the Temple of the Sealed Oath. Clay-sealed crates and rope-tied bundles rest beneath tablet racks, their tags written in the temple’s formal legal script and impressed with wax and lead. A shuttered lantern niche and limewashed walls keep the space dry and austere, while a painted hazard placard over the threshold binds the contents to the city’s interdiction order. The air holds the blended scent of tallow, dust, and old parchment, reflecting its function as a controlled repository rather than a common storeroom.
